zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Flammock於大約1447年出生在英國可瓦爾利札爾德時，他的父親Richard Flammock28歲，母親Johanna Lucombe18歲。他和Elizabeth Trelawney至少有1個女兒。他去世於1497年6月28日在英國倫敦享年51歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Flammock was born about 1447, in Lizard, Cornwall, England, his father, Richard Flammock, was 28 and his mother, Johanna Lucombe, was 18. He had at least 1 daughter with Elizabeth Trelawney. He died on 28 June 1497, in London, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Elizabeth Trelawney. Il est décédé le 28 juin 1497, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.Saint Columb Minor, Saint Columb, Cornwa: St Columb Minor, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom

Er hatte mit Elizabeth Trelawney mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. Juni 1497 im Alter von 51 Jahren in London, England und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Flammockが約1447年にイギリスコルンワルリザルドで生まれた時，父Richard Flammockは28歳，母Johanna Lucombeは18歳であった。彼はElizabeth Trelawneyとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1497年6月28日にイギリスロンドンで51歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Columb Minor, Saint Columb, Cornwa: 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 콜럼 민어
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Flammock(이)가 대략 1447년 영국 코른월 리자르드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Flammock(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Lucombe(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Trelawney(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1497년 6월 28일 영국 런던에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Elizabeth Trelawney. Ele faleceu em 28 de junho de 1497, em London, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Flammock родился около 1447 г. в местности лизард, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Flammock было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Lucombe, 18. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Elizabeth Trelawney. Он умер 28 июня 1497 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.
